<svg width="512" height="512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><linearGradient id="sky" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#87CEEB"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#E0F6FF"/></linearGradient><linearGradient id="water" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#0099CC"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#003366"/></linearGradient></defs><rect width="512" height="512" fill="url(#sky)"/><circle cx="420" cy="90" r="35" fill="#FFD700"/><path d="M0,180 Q128,140 256,180 T512,180 L512,512 L0,512 Z" fill="url(#water)"/><path d="M0,180 Q128,220 256,180 T512,180" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="6" opacity="0.8"/><path d="M0,280 Q128,320 256,280 T512,280" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="4" opacity="0.4"/></svg>

<svg width="512" height="512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <rect width="512" height="512" fill="white"/>
  
  <!-- Left person (speaker) -->
  <circle cx="170" cy="256" r="60" fill="none" stroke="black" stroke-width="4"/>
  <path d="M 130 300 Q 170 280 210 300" fill="none" stroke="black" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  
  <!-- Hand cupped at mouth -->
  <path d="M 210 260 Q 230 250 240 270" fill="none" stroke="black" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <path d="M 235 265 Q 240 275 230 280" fill="none" stroke="black" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  
  <!-- Whisper sound waves (dashed lines) -->
  <path d="M 250 260 Q 280 240 310 260" fill="none" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" stroke-dasharray="6,4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <path d="M 250 275 Q 280 255 310 275" fill="none" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" stroke-dasharray="6,4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <path d="M 250 290 Q 280 270 310 290" fill="none" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" stroke-dasharray="6,4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  
  <!-- Right person (listener) -->
  <circle cx="370" cy="256" r="60" fill="none" stroke="black" stroke-width="4"/>
  <path d="M 330 300 Q 370 280 410 300" fill="none" stroke="black" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  
  <!-- Ear facing the whisper -->
  <path d="M 320 256 Q 310 256 310 266 Q 310 276 320 276" fill="none" stroke="black" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
</svg>
